title: Checkbox
description: An accessible checkbox component with multiple variants, sizes, and label support.

manual.title: Install dependencies
manual.description: Install the Radix UI checkbox primitive and class-variance-authority.

manual.title: Add utility function
manual.description: Create a cn utility function if you don't have one already.

manual.title: Copy the component code
manual.description: Create a new file and paste the checkbox component code.

examples.title: Default
examples.description: A basic checkbox in all three states: unchecked, checked, and disabled.

examples.title: Secondary
examples.description: variant="secondary" — uses the secondary color token for checked state.

examples.title: Destructive
examples.description: variant="destructive" — red-toned border and fill for danger confirmation checkboxes.

examples.title: Outline
examples.description: variant="outline" — transparent background, check mark matches foreground color.

examples.title: Ghost
examples.description: variant="ghost" — muted background without a visible border.

examples.title: Extra Small
examples.description: size="xs" — 12px checkbox for dense table rows or compact lists.

examples.title: Small
examples.description: size="sm" — 14px checkbox for standard form use.

examples.title: Large
examples.description: size="lg" — 20px checkbox for touch-friendly or prominent selections.

examples.title: With Label
examples.description: A checkbox paired with a label and description for forms.
